name: Green Goddess Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup minced parsley, may use dried
3 tablespoons canned anchovies, canned with capers
1 tablespoon chopped chives, may use dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the sardines and capers well and then drain.
2. Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
3. Chill the dressing.
4. Serve with raw vegetables as a dip.
